sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40649" key="e)pipro/sqesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπρόσ-θεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occultation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1181.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristarch.Sam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
